title: Sending a Slack DM based on the person assigned to a task
excerpt: Hello! I’m looking for a way to integrate Slack DMs with the assigning of tasks. Say “X” person is assigned a task, I want that to be sent to them as a DM on Slack. Then if “Y” person is assigned something they get their…

posts.author: Andye91 (Andrew Erickson)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello! I’m looking for a way to integrate Slack DMs with the assigning of tasks. Say “X” person is assigned a task, I want that to be sent to them as a DM on Slack. Then if “Y” person is assigned something they get their own DM as well. The way I see it now is basically once a task is assigned I can pick one person or channel to send to and that’s it. Thanks!
